acceptance_criteria.description: Generation prompt template module compiles without errors
Generation prompt exports match the system prompt and user prompt template from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) generation.ts exports a function that builds the system prompt for atomic task generation matching the canonical system prompt from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md (covering rules for ID generation, dependency symmetry, scope exhaustiveness, criterion types, approach specificity, context_refs tracing, 3-8 tasks target, execution order). (2) Exports a function that builds the user prompt template accepting impl_json, impl_markdown, spec_sections_content, codebase_context, build_command, test_command, lint_command parameters. (3) The system prompt includes all rules from the canonical template. (4) Functions are typed with TaskDefinition and ImplDefinition types from src/types/definitions.ts. PASS if all match. FAIL if any missing rule or parameter.
